node.statement: N1.3 (the lift's self-adjoint part is an O(eta)-eps-JB algebra). F is a unital eta-idempotent UCP map (GT-hyp: F extends to UCP on D with ||F^2-F||_cb<=eta<1/4). Apply GT-cstar-sa-to-epsjb to F: with Ftilde=theta(2F-1), B=Im Ftilde the Choi-Effros O(eta)-C*-algebra under X*Y=Ftilde(XY), the self-adjoint part B_sa under the symmetrized product X∘⋆Y=(1/2)(X*Y+Y*X) is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra (def-eps-jb-algebra) with universal dimension-free constants; its order-unit norm equals the operator norm on B_sa.
